extensionLaligagate.title: Extension LaLigaGate
extensionLaligagate.subtitle: Fighting censorship through technology
extensionLaligagate.shortDescription: Browser extension to detect LaLiga court orders.
extensionLaligagate.viewProjectTitle: Click to see more project details

about.title: About the Extension
about.description: Extension LaLigaGate is a browser extension developed as a digital activism tool against the massive judicial blocks implemented by LaLiga in Spain. This extension helps users understand the impact of internet censorship and provides tools to fight for digital rights and freedom.

features.title: Key Features
features.feature1: Detection of blocked websites and information about judicial blocks
features.feature3: Educational content about digital rights and internet freedom

howToUse.title: How to Use
howToUse.description: The extension is designed to be intuitive and easy to use:
howToUse.step1: Install the extension from Chrome Web Store or GitHub
howToUse.step2: The extension will be activated automatically in your browser
howToUse.step3: Browse normally - the extension will alert you when you encounter blocked content
howToUse.step4: Access the extension panel to see statistics and learn more about internet censorship

resources.title: Resources and Information
resources.description: For more information about judicial blocks, their impact, and ways to participate in digital activism, visit the LaLigaGate section of this website. This extension is part of a broader movement to promote internet freedom and digital rights.

laligagate.title: #laligagate
laligagate.intro: is not just a hashtag. It's an alarm, a wake-up call to rethink what kind of internet we want, one ruled by the interests of a few or one where digital rights and fair access to content are fundamental pillars.

warning.title: ⚠️ This website is affected by LaLiga's blocks
warning.description: This website is among the thousands of URLs blocked by LaLiga in its eagerness to stop piracy. An indiscriminate blocking that affects legitimate sites like this one, demonstrating the serious consequences of these disproportionate measures.

problem.title: The problem of mass blockings
problem.description: Judicial blocks requested by LaLiga have resulted in:

points.censorshipDesc: Thousands of domains affected without individual review
points.rightsDesc: Freedom of expression and access to information compromised
points.falsePositivesDesc: News sites, personal blogs, and educational projects censored

imageCaption.hayahora: - Tool to track LaLiga's mass blockings and allow any user to verify if a website has been unfairly blocked.
imageCaption.judicial: Message from DIGI when trying to access content after a blocked IP when there is football.

impact.title: The real impact on my projects
impact.description: This website is a perfect example of the collateral damage caused by these measures. As a developer and content creator, my personal site has been blocked without any relationship to sports piracy.

merequetenge.name: Merequetenge

impact.massiveBlocks: Mass blockings not only affect alleged piracy, but create a domino effect that damages:

damages.trust: Trust in the internet as a free space

callToAction.title: What can we do?
callToAction.description: It is fundamental that as users we are aware of this problem and demand:
